title: AgentCine
subtitle: AI-Powered Novel to Movie, Full-Workflow Film Creation

features.title: Unleash Infinite Creativity
features.subtitle: Full-process AI assistance, from script to final cut

script.title: AI Script Breakdown
script.description: Deep understanding of literary works, intelligently extracting characters, dialogues, and action scenes
script.detail: Upload your novel or literary work, and AI will automatically analyze story structure, extract key character relationships, plot twists, and dialogue scenes. Supports multilingual text with intelligent narrative pacing recognition, transforming long-form text into professional screenplay format.

storyboard.title: AI Storyboard Generation
storyboard.description: Precisely matching visual styles, generating cinematic storyboard frames with one click
storyboard.detail: Based on script content, AI automatically generates high-quality cinematic storyboards. Switch between multiple visual styles — from realism to cyberpunk, watercolor to black-and-white film. Every frame is carefully calibrated for composition, lighting, and color.

oneClickMovie.title: One-Click Movie
oneClickMovie.description: AI-driven audiovisual fusion, instantly transforming text into high-quality film works
oneClickMovie.detail: From storyboard to final film, just one click. AI automatically arranges visual pacing, blends voiceover, background music, and sound effects to produce professional-quality video. Supports multiple resolution outputs for cross-platform publishing.

oneClickEdit.title: One-Click Editing
oneClickEdit.description: Intelligent rhythm control, automatically completing cutting, color grading, and VFX synthesis
oneClickEdit.detail: Built-in professional video editor with AI-powered cut point detection, cinematic color grading, subtitle placement, and effects. Fine-tune every frame manually for complete creative control.

workflow.title: Four Steps to Your Film Dream
workflow.subtitle: From inspiration to final cut, fully AI-driven
